'''Arabanth''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Interior Region of the [[Hapes Cluster/Legends|Hapes Cluster]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
The [[Arabanthan]]s developed a series of "thought puzzles" that were the pride of the planet. Located in space controlled by the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]], the [[Queen Mother]] of the Consortium would seal off the entire cluster and remained independent throughout the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] petitioned Queen Mother [[Ta'a Chume]] for openness and cooperation, the matriarch obliged by allowing [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]] to visit and present the Republic's case. Pleased with Organa, Chume offered up her son, [[Isolder]], as a suitor for the Princess. The worlds of the Consortium presented their potential new princess with gifts; Arabanth gave Organa an old woman who could recite many of the famed "thought puzzles".<ref name="COPL" />

==Appearances==
